note: seq=38 NO-OP (SAFETY): the box is at 97% memory at 32 procs x48 threads (~1538/min). Doubling to 64 procs would OOM the box and risk killing Postgres (lifeline). Memory is the ceiling on this 8-core/16GB box, NOT lanes. Hold scale; 2k+ needs more RAM or a leaner procs/threads ratio.
